codeReview.summary: The mobile More menu and heading font alias were implemented, but the feature does not fully satisfy the expected behavior because inline fontFamily styles remain in Teleprompter files.

issues.description: Inline fontFamily styling still exists (`style={{ fontFamily: "'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" }}`), violating the feature expectedBehavior requirement that no inline fontFamily styles remain.
Multiple inline fontFamily styles remain in this file (e.g. line 186 and nearby lines 205/212/221/231/240 in commit 887ac29), so the feature is incomplete versus expectedBehavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker procedure requires running both build and lint, but this worker session only recorded build and ad-hoc checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md step 5 requires `npm run build` and `npm run lint`; handoff verification for session b340d308-107e-4d98-8e50-ff2e6f097227 lists `npm run build`, agent-browser style check, and grep only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill guidance for auth-gated UI verification appears incomplete; worker explicitly noted this as a procedure improvement.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'fullstack-worker skill could mention that for auth-gated pages, agent-browser verification may require a login flow or suggest testing non-auth pages when auth is not available.'

summary: Reviewed feature fix-mobile-nav-and-fonts (worker session b340d308-107e-4d98-8e50-ff2e6f097227, commit 887ac29). The More menu and font-heading alias are present, but inline fontFamily styles remain in Teleprompter files, so the feature fails against its expected behavior.
